languages.text: {n}Нунциус молча буравит Висиря пустыми глазницами. Ему вторят взгляды сотен черепов в убранстве храма.{/n}
{n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус молча буравит Висиря пустыми глазницами. Ему вторят взгляды сотен черепов в убранстве храма.{/n}

{n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius mira al Visir con sus cuencas vacías, acompañado de los cientos de cráneos que adornan el templo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius mira al Visir con sus cuencas vacías, acompañado de los cientos de cráneos que adornan el templo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯用他那空洞的眼窝，沉默地凝视着宿老，神殿内成百上千颗头骨仿佛也在与他一同注视。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯用他那空洞的眼窝，沉默地凝视着宿老，神殿内成百上千颗头骨仿佛也在与他一同注视。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius fixe le vizir de ses orbites vides, tout comme les centaines de crânes qui ornent le temple.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius fixe le vizir de ses orbites vides, tout comme les centaines de crânes qui ornent le temple.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, boş göz çukurlarından Vezir'e sessizce bakıyor. Bakışları, tapınağı süsleyen yüzlerce kafatası tarafından yankılanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, boş göz çukurlarından Vezir'e sessizce bakıyor. Bakışları, tapınağı süsleyen yüzlerce kafatası tarafından yankılanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスは空ろな眼窩を通してヴィジエルを無言で見つめ、その視線は寺院を飾る数百の頭蓋骨に反響している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ヌンキウスは空ろな眼窩を通してヴィジエルを無言で見つめ、その視線は寺院を飾る数百の頭蓋骨に反響している。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius starrt mit seinen leeren Augenhöhlen schweigend auf den Wesir. Sein Echo wird von den Hunderten Schädeln, die den Tempel zieren, zurückgeworfen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius stares silently at the Vizsier through his empty eye sockets, his gaze echoed by the hundreds of skulls adorning the temple.{/n}
